<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime]][[fa:اوشیساکا نو اوناکاتسوهیمه]][[ja:忍坂大中姫]][[zh:忍坂大中姬]] {{Infobox person|image=File:NAJDA-158-0155 全像本朝古今列女伝1 (大中姫).jpg|gender={{ill|female|qid=Q6581072}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038}}|spouse={{ill|Ingyō|qid=Q349258}}|children={{ill|Emperor Ankō|qid=Q361010}}; {{ill|Prince Kinashi no Karu|qid=Q7244124}}; {{ill|Prince Sakai no Kurohiko|qid=Q11429115}}; {{ill|Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko|qid=Q11391819}}; {{ill|Princess Karu no Ōiratsume|qid=Q11637582}}; {{ill|Yūryaku|qid=Q357235}}|father={{ill|Wakanuke-Futamata no Miko|qid=Q13264213}}|relatives={{ill|Daidaishaku-o|qid=Q11493025}}; {{ill|Sotoori hime|qid=Q11626419}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11072207]] Wikidata name: Oshisaka no Ōnakatsu no Hime [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|忍坂大中姫|date=January 2023}} {{Infobox royalty |consort = yes |name = Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime |image = NAJDA-158-0155 全像本朝古今列女伝1 (大中姫).jpg |succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] |reign = 413–453 |succession1 = [[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = appointed in 453 |spouse = [[:en:Emperor Ingyō|Emperor Ingyō]] |issue = {{plainlist| *[[:en:Prince Kinashi no Karu|Prince Kinashi no Karu]] *Princess Nagata no Ōiratsume *Prince Sakai no Kurohiko *[[:en:Emperor Ankō|Emperor Ankō]] *Princess Karu no Ōiratsume *Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko *[[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] *Princess Tajima no Tachibana no Ōiratsume *Princess Sakami}} |royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] |father = Prince Wakanuke no Futamata |mother = |birth_date = |birth_place = |death_date = after 453 |death_place = |date of burial = |place of burial = |}}
'''Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime''' (? – after 453) was [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] as the consort of [[:en:Emperor Ingyō|Emperor Ingyō]].<ref>[https://glim-re.repo.nii.ac.jp/?action=repository_action_common_download&item_id=805&item_no=1&attribute_id=22&file_no=1 Shigaku]</ref> In the ''[[Nihon Shoki]]'', she has a younger sister named [[:en:Princess Sotoorihime|Otohime]] who becomes estranged with her husband.
Daughter of Prince Wakanuke no Futamata; granddaughter of [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]]. Gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Ankō|Emperor Ankō]], [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] and seven other children. Empress Dowager from 453.
*First Son: {{Nihongo|[[:en:Prince Kinashi no Karu|Prince Kinashi no Karu]]|木梨軽皇子}} *First Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Nagata no Ōiratsume|名形大娘皇女}} *Second Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Sakai no Kurohiko|境黒彦皇子|extra=d.456}} *Third Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Anaho|穴穂皇子}}, later [[:en:Emperor Ankō|Emperor Ankō]] (401?–456) *Second Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Karu no Ōiratsume|軽大娘皇女}} *Fourth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko|八釣白彦皇子|extra=401-456}} *Fifth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Ōhatuse no Wakatakeru|大泊瀬稚武皇子}}, later [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] *Third Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Tajima no Tachibana no Ōiratsume|但馬橘大娘皇女}} *Fourth Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Sakami|酒見皇女}}
==Notes== {{reflist}}
{{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Princess Kusakanohatabino|Princess Kusakanohatabino]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] | after=[[Princess Nakashi]] | years=413–453}} {{succession box | before= [[Nakatsuhime]] | title=[[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Princess Tachibana no Nakatsu]] | years=appointed in 453}} {{s-end}}

*First Son: {{Nihongo|[[:en:Prince Kinashi no Karu|Prince Kinashi no Karu]]|木梨軽皇子}} *First Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Nagata no Ōiratsume|名形大娘皇女}} *Second Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Sakai no Kurohiko|境黒彦皇子|extra=d.456}} *Third Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Anaho|穴穂皇子}}, later [[:en:Emperor Ankō|Emperor Ankō]] (401?–456) *Second Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Karu no Ōiratsume|軽大娘皇女}} *Fourth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko|八釣白彦皇子|extra=401-456}} *Fifth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Ōhatuse no Wakatakeru|大泊瀬稚武皇子}}, later [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] *Third Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Tajima no Tachibana no Ōiratsume|但馬橘大娘皇女}} *Fourth Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Sakami|酒見皇女}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime]][[fa:اوشیساکا نو اوناکاتسوهیمه]][[ja:忍坂大中姫]][[zh:忍坂大中姬]] {{Infobox person|image=File:NAJDA-158-0155 全像本朝古今列女伝1 (大中姫).jpg|gender={{ill|female|WD=Q6581072}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038}}|spouse={{ill|Ingyō|WD=Q349258}}|children={{ill|Emperor Ankō|WD=Q361010}}; {{ill|Prince Kinashi no Karu|WD=Q7244124}}; {{ill|Prince Sakai no Kurohiko|WD=Q11429115}}; {{ill|Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko|WD=Q11391819}}; {{ill|Princess Karu no Ōiratsume|WD=Q11637582}}; {{ill|Yūryaku|WD=Q357235}}|father={{ill|Wakanuke-Futamata no Miko|WD=Q13264213}}|relatives={{ill|Daidaishaku-o|WD=Q11493025}}; {{ill|Sotoori hime|WD=Q11626419}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11072207]] Wikidata name: Oshisaka no Ōnakatsu no Hime [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|忍坂大中姫|date=January 2023}} {{Infobox royalty |consort = yes |name = Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime |image = NAJDA-158-0155 全像本朝古今列女伝1 (大中姫).jpg |succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] |reign = 413–453 |succession1 = [[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] |reign1 = appointed in 453 |spouse = [[:en:Emperor Ingyō|Emperor Ingyō]] |issue = {{plainlist| *[[:en:Prince Kinashi no Karu|Prince Kinashi no Karu]] *Princess Nagata no Ōiratsume *Prince Sakai no Kurohiko *[[:en:Emperor Ankō|Emperor Ankō]] *Princess Karu no Ōiratsume *Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko *[[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] *Princess Tajima no Tachibana no Ōiratsume *Princess Sakami}} |royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] |father = Prince Wakanuke no Futamata |mother = |birth_date = |birth_place = |death_date = after 453 |death_place = |date of burial = |place of burial = |}}
'''Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime''' (? – after 453) was [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] as the consort of [[:en:Emperor Ingyō|Emperor Ingyō]].<ref>[https://glim-re.repo.nii.ac.jp/?action=repository_action_common_download&item_id=805&item_no=1&attribute_id=22&file_no=1 Shigaku]</ref> In the ''[[Nihon Shoki]]'', she has a younger sister named [[:en:Princess Sotoorihime|Otohime]] who becomes estranged with her husband.
Daughter of Prince Wakanuke no Futamata; granddaughter of [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]]. Gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Ankō|Emperor Ankō]], [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] and seven other children. Empress Dowager from 453.
*First Son: {{Nihongo|[[:en:Prince Kinashi no Karu|Prince Kinashi no Karu]]|木梨軽皇子}} *First Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Nagata no Ōiratsume|名形大娘皇女}} *Second Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Sakai no Kurohiko|境黒彦皇子|extra=d.456}} *Third Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Anaho|穴穂皇子}}, later [[:en:Emperor Ankō|Emperor Ankō]] (401?–456) *Second Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Karu no Ōiratsume|軽大娘皇女}} *Fourth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko|八釣白彦皇子|extra=401-456}} *Fifth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Ōhatuse no Wakatakeru|大泊瀬稚武皇子}}, later [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] *Third Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Tajima no Tachibana no Ōiratsume|但馬橘大娘皇女}} *Fourth Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Sakami|酒見皇女}}
==Notes== {{reflist}}
{{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[:en:Princess Kusakanohatabino|Princess Kusakanohatabino]] | title=[[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] | after=[[Princess Nakashi]] | years=413–453}} {{succession box | before= [[Nakatsuhime]] | title=[[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] | after=[[Princess Tachibana no Nakatsu]] | years=appointed in 453}} {{s-end}}

'''Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime''' (? – after 453) was [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] as the consort of [[:en:Emperor Ingyō|Emperor Ingyō]].<ref>[https://glim-re.repo.nii.ac.jp/?action=repository_action_common_download&item_id=805&item_no=1&attribute_id=22&file_no=1 Shigaku]</ref> In the ''[[Nihon Shoki]]'', she has a younger sister named [[:en:Princess Sotoorihime|Otohime]] who becomes estranged with her husband.
Daughter of Prince Wakanuke no Futamata; granddaughter of [[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Emperor Ōjin]]. Gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Ankō|Emperor Ankō]], [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] and seven other children. Empress Dowager from 453.
*First Son: {{Nihongo|[[:en:Prince Kinashi no Karu|Prince Kinashi no Karu]]|木梨軽皇子}} *First Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Nagata no Ōiratsume|名形大娘皇女}} *Second Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Sakai no Kurohiko|境黒彦皇子|extra=d.456}} *Third Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Anaho|穴穂皇子}}, later [[:en:Emperor Ankō|Emperor Ankō]] (401?–456) *Second Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Karu no Ōiratsume|軽大娘皇女}} *Fourth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko|八釣白彦皇子|extra=401-456}} *Fifth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Ōhatuse no Wakatakeru|大泊瀬稚武皇子}}, later [[:en:Emperor Yūryaku|Emperor Yūryaku]] *Third Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Tajima no Tachibana no Ōiratsume|但馬橘大娘皇女}} *Fourth Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Sakami|酒見皇女}}
==Notes== {{reflist}}

'''Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime''' (? – after 453) was {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan}} as the consort of {{ill|Emperor Ingyō|en|Emperor Ingyō|WD=Q349258|lt=Emperor Ingyō}}.<ref>[https://glim-re.repo.nii.ac.jp/?action=repository_action_common_download&item_id=805&item_no=1&attribute_id=22&file_no=1 Shigaku]</ref> In the ''[[Nihon Shoki]]'', she has a younger sister named {{ill|Princess Sotoorihime|en|Princess Sotoorihime|WD=Q11626419|lt=Otohime}} who becomes estranged with her husband. 

Daughter of Prince Wakanuke no Futamata; granddaughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|WD=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin}}. Gave birth to {{ill|Emperor Ankō|en|Emperor Ankō|WD=Q361010|lt=Emperor Ankō}}, {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|WD=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku}} and seven other children. Empress Dowager from 453.

*First Son: {{Nihongo|{{ill|Prince Kinashi no Karu|en|Prince Kinashi no Karu|WD=Q7244124|lt=Prince Kinashi no Karu}}|木梨軽皇子}}
*First Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Nagata no Ōiratsume|名形大娘皇女}}
*Second Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Sakai no Kurohiko|境黒彦皇子|extra=d.456}}
*Third Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Anaho|穴穂皇子}}, later {{ill|Emperor Ankō|en|Emperor Ankō|WD=Q361010|lt=Emperor Ankō}} (401?–456)
*Second Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Karu no Ōiratsume|軽大娘皇女}}
*Fourth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko|八釣白彦皇子|extra=401-456}}
*Fifth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Ōhatuse no Wakatakeru|大泊瀬稚武皇子}}, later {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|WD=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku}}
*Third Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Tajima no Tachibana no Ōiratsume|但馬橘大娘皇女}}
*Fourth Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Sakami|酒見皇女}}

'''Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime''' (? – after 453) was {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan}} as the consort of {{ill|Emperor Ingyō|en|Emperor Ingyō|WD=Q349258|lt=Emperor Ingyō}}.<ref>[https://glim-re.repo.nii.ac.jp/?action=repository_action_common_download&item_id=805&item_no=1&attribute_id=22&file_no=1 Shigaku]</ref> In the ''[[Nihon Shoki]]'', she has a younger sister named {{ill|Princess Sotoorihime|en|Princess Sotoorihime|WD=Q11626419|lt=Otohime}} who becomes estranged with her husband. 

Daughter of Prince Wakanuke no Futamata; granddaughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|WD=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin}}. Gave birth to {{ill|Emperor Ankō|en|Emperor Ankō|WD=Q361010|lt=Emperor Ankō}}, {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|WD=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku}} and seven other children. Empress Dowager from 453.

*First Son: {{Nihongo|{{ill|Prince Kinashi no Karu|en|Prince Kinashi no Karu|WD=Q7244124|lt=Prince Kinashi no Karu}}|木梨軽皇子}}
*First Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Nagata no Ōiratsume|名形大娘皇女}}
*Second Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Sakai no Kurohiko|境黒彦皇子|extra=d.456}}
*Third Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Anaho|穴穂皇子}}, later {{ill|Emperor Ankō|en|Emperor Ankō|WD=Q361010|lt=Emperor Ankō}} (401?–456)
*Second Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Karu no Ōiratsume|軽大娘皇女}}
*Fourth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko|八釣白彦皇子|extra=401-456}}
*Fifth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Ōhatuse no Wakatakeru|大泊瀬稚武皇子}}, later {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|WD=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku}}
*Third Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Tajima no Tachibana no Ōiratsume|但馬橘大娘皇女}}
*Fourth Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Sakami|酒見皇女}}

'''Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime''' (? – after 453) was {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} as the consort of {{ill|Emperor Ingyō|en|Emperor Ingyō|WD=Q349258|lt=Emperor Ingyō|1=Emperor Ingyō}}.<ref>[https://glim-re.repo.nii.ac.jp/?action=repository_action_common_download&item_id=805&item_no=1&attribute_id=22&file_no=1 Shigaku]</ref> In the ''[[Nihon Shoki]]'', she has a younger sister named {{ill|Princess Sotoorihime|en|Princess Sotoorihime|WD=Q11626419|lt=Otohime|1=Princess Sotoorihime}} who becomes estranged with her husband. 

Daughter of Prince Wakanuke no Futamata; granddaughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|WD=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin|1=Emperor Ōjin}}. Gave birth to {{ill|Emperor Ankō|en|Emperor Ankō|WD=Q361010|lt=Emperor Ankō|1=Emperor Ankō}}, {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|WD=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku|1=Emperor Yūryaku}} and seven other children. Empress Dowager from 453.

*First Son: {{Nihongo|{{ill|Prince Kinashi no Karu|en|Prince Kinashi no Karu|WD=Q7244124|lt=Prince Kinashi no Karu|1=Prince Kinashi no Karu}}|木梨軽皇子}}
*First Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Nagata no Ōiratsume|名形大娘皇女}}
*Second Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Sakai no Kurohiko|境黒彦皇子|extra=d.456}}
*Third Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Anaho|穴穂皇子}}, later {{ill|Emperor Ankō|en|Emperor Ankō|WD=Q361010|lt=Emperor Ankō|1=Emperor Ankō}} (401?–456)
*Second Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Karu no Ōiratsume|軽大娘皇女}}
*Fourth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Yatsuri no Shirahiko|八釣白彦皇子|extra=401-456}}
*Fifth Son: {{Nihongo|Prince Ōhatuse no Wakatakeru|大泊瀬稚武皇子}}, later {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|WD=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku|1=Emperor Yūryaku}}
*Third Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Tajima no Tachibana no Ōiratsume|但馬橘大娘皇女}}
*Fourth Daughter: {{Nihongo|Princess Sakami|酒見皇女}}
